description_long: This hotel complex features a series of detached, bungalow-style units arranged symmetrically along landscaped pathways, with a central main building that appears larger and more prominent. The roofs are pitched and covered in a material resembling thatch or shingles, giving the property a rustic, resort-like appearance. Blue rectangular pools or water features are interspersed between the buildings, adding a sense of luxury and relaxation. The grounds are bordered by green lawns and a perimeter road or parking area, with visible parking spaces along one edge. The main building is surrounded by a larger pool and has a covered entrance area, suggesting it serves as the lobby or reception. The overall layout is orderly and designed for both privacy and communal amenities, typical of a resort or vacation hotel.
description: A resort-style hotel complex with multiple bungalow units, a central main building, and several blue pools set in landscaped grounds.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main building with a large pool in front, flanked by rows of bungalow units and landscaped paths.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the arrangement of bungalow units, blue pools, and the parking area along the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the symmetrical layout of the bungalows, central pathways, and visible parking spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the main building, water features, and the distribution of units across the property.
attribute_entrance_canopy: thatched roof canopy over main entrance
